title: ESC Biweekly Poll – Rank Your Favourite Food Vendors That Deliver (For Interclub)
excerpt: We’re looking into outsourcing a good chunk of our food offering to increase the quality of food available after Interclub. Please select any or all of the following options, or add others in the comments below.   Results Our top 4 selections are: Northern Chicken Royal Pizza Lashish Famoso Pizza We will explore these restaurants … Read more
content:
We’re looking into outsourcing a good chunk of our food offering to increase the quality of food available after Interclub. Please select any or all of the following options, or add others in the comments below.

 

Results

Our top 4 selections are:

  1. Northern Chicken
  2. Royal Pizza
  3. Lashish
  4. Famoso Pizza

We will explore these restaurants to see what we can come up with for Interclub season in a couple months. Thanks for everyone’s input!
